channel.title: Welcome to Ceesaxp on IPAP Consulting
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to Ceesaxp on IPAP Consulting

item.title: Startups and Fear of Success
item.description: The fear of success is a common phenomenon among startup founders. It is the fear of achieving one’s goals and realizing one’s potential. This fear can be paralyzing and prevent entrepreneurs from taking the necessary risks to grow their businesses. In this article, we will explore the causes of the fear of success and how to overcome it. Causes of the Fear of Success The fear of success can be caused by a variety of factors, including:

item.title: Clients' Testimonilas
item.description: “No nonsense transformative impact on our business!” “Exceptional leadership and innovative solutions.” “I would highly recommend these guys to any business looking to grow and succeed.” “Where I was unsure how to proceed with my idea – you guided me to find answers myself.” Contact us today to see how we can help you grow and succeed.

item.title: How we work
item.description: Awareness You already have the answers to most of your pressing questions. Our task is to help you realize them and find effective ways to implement them. Effectiveness We don’t stretch deadlines for additional profit: you get a clear and measurable result within the first 10-12 weeks. Speed We value speed: in decision-making, in testing hypotheses, in determining why they don’t work — this way, we achieve a working result faster.

item.title: Services and Approach
item.description: Services Impact Investment Consulting: Focus on ESG projects for people with disabilities, special needs children, young adults, and the elderly. Startup Mentorship: Guidance on building high-performance teams and developing innovative products. Technology and Finance Advisory: Leveraging extensive industry experience to provide strategic insights. Approach People-Centric Technology: Emphasizing the importance of people in technology-driven solutions. High-Performance Teams: Creating and leading teams that deliver outstanding results. Client Focus: Committed to exceeding client expectations through innovative and tailored solutions.

item.title: Thanks for getting in touch
item.description: We try to reply to most emails within a few business days. In the meantime, you can check out our latest blog posts or learn more about us.

item.title: Who are we?
item.description: Our consultancy, founded by an experienced banking IT professional with a proven track record of over 30 years, specializes in assembling and leading high-performance teams. Our expertise spans change management, agile practices, and corporate accelerators. Professional Background General Partner at venture fund Managing Director, CTO at for a major cross-border payment startup CEO at one of the largest easter-Europena ecommerce platforms Chairman of the Supervisory Board at a non-banking financial institution Various independent director roles in financial institutions, banks, clearing houses CIO & Management Board member at a leading easter-European bank Education BA in Business Administration, from Truman State University Banking & Finance, Academy of Finance under the Government of the Russian Federation

item.title: Why are we different
item.description: Unique Selling Points Extensive Experience: Over 30 years in finance and technology. Proven Track Record: Successful transformation and leadership in multiple organizations. Innovative Approach: Combines traditional expertise with cutting-edge agile and DevOps practices. Client-Centric: Dedicated to understanding and exceeding client expectations. Impact-Focused: Committed to projects that deliver real value to society. Discover how we can transform your business. Learn more or read what our clients say.
